items.html: *The third discernment is at the time of the Yenika [suckling] of ZA [Zeir Anpin]. For then the two of them came out from within the upper Hey, in the secret of birth, and were revealed outside; he became the Vav of the Name, and she became the lower Hey of the Name, cleaving to the back of the Vav. The matter is that in the secret of the Ibur [conception], her point rose and clothed the Yesod, which itself clothes the Tifferet; and when they came outside, she did not descend with the Yesod when it descended and spread out from upon the Tifferet, whereby six revealed points were made in him. Rather, she remained cleaving there above, behind the Tifferet, encircling him from behind.
